name: M4A1消音版 | 紧迫危机
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. A custom paint job of multicolored safety signs has been applied. Don't say I didn't warn you… - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器采用了多色安全标志的自定义涂装。 别说我没提醒你……- 军火商布兹
